ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* List of corequisite courses */,
  "equivalent_courses" TEXT /* List of equivalent courses */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently active */,
  "last_offered" TEXT /* Last term the course was offered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head instructor of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "term_offered" TEXT /* Term when the course is offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course offering */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course offering */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course offering (classroom or online) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the offering */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled students */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course offering is open for enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instructor is currently active */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the instructor for scheduling purposes */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major department */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrolled_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student enrolled */,
  "withdrawn_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student withdrew (if applicable) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, withdrawn, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the notification is related to */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient (student or instructor) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., announcement, reminder, alert) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the recipient */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender (e.g., instructor, administrator) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)
